purpose: Define the repo-source line budget as a ratchet gate: new oversized files are blocked unless reviewed, existing reviewed baselines cannot grow, and retired baselines must be removed.
machine_boundary: This contract owns line-budget thresholds and reviewed oversized-file baselines for tracked source files. It does not define domain truth, production readiness, release readiness, or quality verdict authority.

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical runtime completion entry; no-growth ratchet while semantic completion helpers continue to be thinned
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: agent lab completion entry remains stable while subresponsibilities move to focused agent-lab modules

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical stage-attempt surface; no-growth ratchet while durable attempt primitives remain centralized
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: stage attempt public surface stays stable while query, closeout, and provider-specific helpers move to focused modules

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical app drilldown aggregator; no-growth ratchet while projection groups are reorganized by semantic owner
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: app drilldown entry should become a thin semantic aggregator over evidence, routes, provider, detail, and summary packages

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical agent-lab test file; no-growth ratchet while behavior cases are moved by feature axis
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: agent lab tests should split by task manifest, recovery, efficiency, promotion, and completion behavior

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical domain-pack compiler CLI case; no-growth ratchet while independent compiler scenarios move to case files
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: domain pack compiler tests should split by fixture, compiler contract, drift manifest, and real-repo smoke behavior

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical app drilldown CLI case; no-growth ratchet while projection-specific tests continue moving to scoped cases
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: app drilldown tests should split by detail, summary, action routes, provider evidence, domain payloads, and app release evidence

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical Codex stage runner test file; no-growth ratchet while provider-env and protocol cases are separated
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: Codex stage runner tests should split by protocol, provider env, recovery, and launch/closeout behavior
